name_en: 🆕【Top Quality Replica】M12838 Light Blue👏👏A card case finished in Monogram Maccasse (one of Mason's classic canvases). The effortless color accents are its charm. The top dyed denim leather strap and matching lining add an unexpected twist. Size: 11 x 7 x 1.5cm.
